title: VELCRO Brand Stick On Coins Double Sided Hook & Loop Self Adhesive Sticky Coins Perfect for Room Décor & Home, Office, Garage Use White 16mm x 16mm Set of 16
features: STRONG & SECURE HOLD: The best strong sticky pads for creating a long-lasting bond that applies easily to walls, glass, tile, plastic, metal, and wood - ideal for everyday use. These hook and loop dots can hold up to 300g per 20x20mm

REUSABLE, MULTI-PURPOSE: Keep items such as small tools, electrical appliances, and more tidy and secure with double-sided sticky pads. Use the versatile adhesive dots as wall sticky pads or as number plate sticky pads, the possibilities are endless

PRESS & SET COINS: Easy to use pre-cut sticky coins, just clean the surface, peel off the protective backing, and firmly press the sticky pad against the surface. Allow the self adhesive pads to set for 24 hours to achieve full strength

IDEAL FOR SCHOOL SUPPLIES: Teachers can keep the classroom fun & tidy with these double sided sticky dots - fasten items to desks, stick nametags to the back of chairs, or adhere erasers and markers to the whiteboard with our strong adhesive pads

SUITABLE FOR SMOOTH SURFACES: Double sided dots that function as sticky adhesive pads with backs that will adhere to most smooth surfaces, providing a strong grip for organising & fastening. No sewing, glueing, or destructive tools required
